key_quote: No ablation study separating contributions of TDA features vs. dataset expansion (9x growth), making it impossible to attribute the reported improvements
rationale: The TDA features for topology-invariant feature engineering are acknowledged as genuinely novel by all reviewers. If the implementation had proper ablations, hardware validation, and honest CEGAR terminology, reviewers would not say 'not novel.' The primary blockers are missing ablation studies, no baselines, CEGAR misnaming, shallow neuro-symbolic integration, and simulation-only evaluation — all depth/rigor/completeness issues. Category B.
